cells.rationale: Contract-touching wire delivery change guarded by a subtle correctness invariant — the restart probe reads absent-boot-header as positive caught-up evidence, so re-routing the event-store block must be byte-identically non-disturbing, a nameable intelligence-bound opus gate at the contract-shaped xhigh band.
